profile_role: biological priors, anti-marker rules, spatial expectations and safety gates; never a label answer

reference_scope.GSE233801: adult estrus sheep somatic anchors; does not sufficiently define Oocyte, Theca or Epithelial and preserves unknown clusters
reference_scope.iScience_2025_sheep_ovarian_development: developmental sheep reference with Oocyte, Theca and Epithelial programs; stage and sampling dependent

granulosa.spatial_expectation: concentric follicular inner wall; cumulus adjacent to oocyte and mural granulosa along follicular/antral wall
granulosa.safety: ZP-family or other oocyte-adjacent RNA without a non-ZP oocyte core does not convert a coherent granulosa program into Oocyte

theca_steroidogenic.spatial_expectation: outer ring around growing follicles, often vascular-associated
theca_steroidogenic.safety: ECM or LHCGR alone cannot define Theca

theca_progenitor_follicular_stroma.safety: without steroidogenic program retain follicular stromal/theca-progenitor or interface

stromal.spatial_expectation: broad ECM background; cortical dense and medullary more vascular
stromal.safety: ECM, stress or ribosomal splits are states unless independent lineage evidence exists

mural_perivascular.spatial_expectation: adjacent to or wrapping endothelial branches

lymphatic_endothelial.safety: PDPN, LYVE1 or CCL21 alone is insufficient

immune.safety: JCHAIN, CD74 or MHC alone cannot define an immune lineage

luteal_steroidogenic.spatial_expectation: large coherent luteal structure rather than a thin follicular ring
luteal_steroidogenic.safety: stage is required for confident corpus-luteum or luteal subtype labels; generic steroidogenesis alone remains steroidogenic somatic

neural_schwann.spatial_expectation: thin nerve-like tracks, often accompanying vessels
neural_schwann.safety: PLP1, MPZ or GFRA3 alone is insufficient; require a coherent glial program and track-like morphology

epithelial_mesothelial.safety: WT1 or MUC16 alone and internal ECM-rich points remain review

contamination_rules.oocyte_to_granulosa: zona transcripts may extend into adjacent granulosa/cellbins; require a non-ZP oocyte core and object-level morphology before Oocyte
contamination_rules.stromal_ecm: abundant collagen/MGP/SPARC RNA can enter neighboring bins; ECM alone cannot replace a coherent resident lineage
contamination_rules.secreted_or_mhc: secreted ligands, JCHAIN, CD74 or MHC alone cannot define the producing lineage
contamination_rules.decision: when resident and contaminating programs coexist, retain or return the observation to an interface pool and test it with relevant anchors

pool_policy.granulosa: include high-confidence granulosa anchors plus granulosa-interface queries; isolate strict Oocyte candidates
pool_policy.theca_stroma: joint review allowed only with androgenic-theca, generic-stroma and mural/perivascular anchors plus outer-ring morphology
pool_policy.qc_holdout: large post-clustering holdouts first undergo full broad-anchor query-only reclustering; remaining rejects receive depth-matched atlas/internal-anchor/marker/observed-density-spatial review; rescued observations are never fine anchors
pool_policy.rollback: if a split has only UMAP separation or only ECM/stress/cell-cycle/ribosomal differences, return to the parent label

resolution_policy.principle: choose the lowest resolution preserving stable functional compartments

evidence_gates.broad_defined: at least two independent positive marker families, low major anti-program, spatial plausibility when available, adjacent-resolution stability; atlas alone cannot pass
evidence_gates.fine_defined: broad locked first; subtype program, morphology and resolution stability require at least two supporting channels without strong contradiction
evidence_gates.broad_only: broad supported but subtype evidence insufficient; fine_anchor_eligible=false
evidence_gates.interface_review: real mixed programs cannot be reliably separated after targeted review; retain rather than force
evidence_gates.rare_defined: multi-module program plus specific spatial object/morphology; single marker or tiny cluster enters rare review

final_validation.rule: HVG/BANKSY features may select clusters, but final canonical positive/negative marker validation must use a full-feature count/data object; absence from an HVG matrix is not negative expression evidence

multi_route_policy.vascular_safety: a vascular-neighborhood or CCL21-rich stromal population cannot close as endothelial without an endothelial backbone and balanced endothelial/mural/stromal anchor review
multi_route_policy.follicular_wall_safety: follicular stromal/theca-associated cannot close as one fine label when steroidogenic theca, collagen/contractile wall and granulosa-interface programs remain jointly plausible

context_questions: cell, nucleus, spot or cellbin observation unit
primary biological questions and priority lineages
